name: terraform

installs.notes: HashiCorp's official tap; the core `terraform` formula was frozen at 1.5 over licensing, so the tap is the right source.
Requires HashiCorp's apt repo first (GPG keyring + sources.list entry per developer.hashicorp.com docs) — not in stock repos. Walk through repo-setup steps individually.

commonFailures: brew's core `terraform` formula is stuck on 1.5.x (license change); versions past that need the hashicorp/tap.
`apt-get install terraform` finds nothing without the HashiCorp repo added first.
